title: Turn rough notes into a clean first draft
prompt: You are a sharp editor. Here are my messy notes for a blog post. Turn them into a clear 400 word draft for a general audience, in a warm and plain voice, with a short intro and three sections. Notes:

title: A week of dinners from what you already have
prompt: Act as a practical home cook. Here is what is in my fridge and pantry. Give me five weeknight dinners that use mostly these, each under 30 minutes, as a simple numbered list with the missing ingredients flagged. I have:
